items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · BEDFORD COUNTY: Missing Endangered Person Advisory. Everett Boro PD is searching for John Markle. Call 911 if seen.

· Troopers Colon and Galasso joined the Philly Phanatic at Citizens Bank Park to remind drivers to buckle up during the “Click It or Ticket” press conference hosted by the Phillies and PennDOT. Buckle up. Every trip, every time.

· May 13 K9 Rip, currently PSP’s only bloodhound, has assisted with many cases since August. K9 Rip and handler Trooper Petrof have successfully tracked people and discovered evidence across miles of terrain, including dozens of missing or endangered persons and criminal suspects.

items.title: Missing Endangered Person Advisory (MEPA)
items.text: · May 12 Missing Endangered Person Advisory UPDATE: Selwyn Forrester was located and is safe. The MEPA is canceled. Thank you for the RTs.

· May 12 In honor of #NationalPoliceWeek, please join us in thanking all our law enforcement brothers and sisters who have dedicated their lives to keeping our communities safe by serving, protecting, and upholding the law.
